texto: Just calling one's practice "approach and accomplishment" and staying in retreat for years will produce nothing but hardship. Completing hundreds of millions of mantras will not even bring the warmth of the ordinary qualities that mark one's progress on the path! In other words, if the essential points of the path are not taken into account, perseverance will amount to nothing more than chasing a mirage.
explicacao: Citação de Patrul Rinpoche sobre temas ligados a reflexao. “Just calling one's practice "approach and accomplishment" and staying in retreat for years will p…” articula reflexao, 1860, buddhism em registro de reflexao, com relevância para contextos como buddhism e mantra.

frase_original: Just calling one's practice "approach and accomplishment" and staying in retreat for years will produce nothing but hardship. Completing hundreds of millions of mantras will not even bring the warmth of the ordinary qualities that mark one's progress on the path! In other words, if the essential points of the path are not taken into account, perseverance will amount to nothing more than chasing a mirage.

texto: What makes an action positive or negative? Not how it looks, not whether it is big or small, but it is the positive or negative motivation that is behind it. No matter how many teachings that you have heard, to be motivated by ordinary concerns, such as a desire for greatness, fame or whatever, is not the way of the true Dharma.
explicacao: Pergunta retórica de Patrul Rinpoche que provoca temas ligados a motivacao. Ao questionar “What makes an action positive or negative? Not how it looks, not whether it is big or small, but …”, o texto convida o leitor a revisar crenças sobre motivacao, action, dharma, com foco em dharma e fame.
